last_scan.last_telegram_summary: FLASH UPDATE: US-Iran Pakistan talks collapsed (Vance confirmed, Apr 12). Ceasefire cracks scenario 30%→60%+. WTI $96.57, physical Brent $131.97. OMC pain at Wednesday open. Watch Nifty 23,500. Check Tue night for Hormuz incident.

calendar.event: India March CPI inflation data release
calendar.expected: Previous 3.21% in Feb; market expects benign, but March captured peak crude
Full-day closure. Gap risk for Wednesday.
Expiry-day volatility amplified by holiday-compressed week
Muted 0.5-1.5% QoQ revenue growth; low bar to clear
NIM recovery >3.65% is key trigger. Deposits +14.4% YoY.
Strong lending growth. Credit cost normalization key watch.

calendar.event: Infosys Q4 FY26 results + FY27 guidance
calendar.expected: FY27 guidance range 2-6% across brokerages. Binary outcome.
Monthly expiry with heightened OI rollover
Potential rate cut from 5.25% if inflation stays benign

tracker.title: US-Iran Ceasefire & Strait of Hormuz
tracker.india_impact: Islamabad talks COLLAPSED (Vance, Apr 12) — no deal after 21 hrs. Iran demanded Hormuz control + reparations. Two-week ceasefire still nominal but breakdown risk high. Ceasefire cracks probability 60%+. Crude WTI $96.57, physical Brent $131.97. OMCs (BPCL/HPCL) under pressure; ONGC mixed (crude up, marketing drag). 23,500 PE hedge validity increasing.
tracker.watch_for: Any Hormuz military incident Mon/Tue. Crude futures breaking $100. Tuesday night/Wednesday pre-market for gap risk assessment.

tracker.title: Q4 FY26 Earnings Season
tracker.india_impact: TCS kicked off with 29% profit beat but stock fell 2% — sell-the-news pattern. HDFC Bank Apr 18 is the critical event. Market needs earnings to justify 6% rally.
tracker.watch_for: HDFC Bank NIM >3.65%. Infosys FY27 guidance. Banking NPA trends.

tracker.title: Crude Oil Volatility
tracker.india_impact: Brent $95-97 still elevated vs pre-war $75-80. Singapore GRMs collapsed to negative $9.4 — devastating for refiners. Any ceasefire breakdown sends crude to $110+.
tracker.watch_for: Hormuz shipping lanes. OPEC+ supply response. Weekly inventory data.

tracker.title: RBI Monetary Policy Path
tracker.india_impact: Held at 5.25% on Apr 8. CPI 3.21% in Feb gives room for cuts. March CPI (Mon) is critical — hot print kills June cut hopes.
tracker.watch_for: March CPI release Apr 13. Crude trajectory. Global bond yields.

tracker.title: FII Flows & Rupee
tracker.india_impact: 6% rally suggests FII buying returning. USD/INR at 93.0-93.1 stable. Continued inflows depend on ceasefire holding.
tracker.watch_for: Daily FII/DII data. USD/INR movements. Global risk sentiment.
